en.value:
A description of the main activities of the project 
            2.1  Development of personnel, programme and budget structure and policies for the provision of social welfare services for children.
            2.2  Capacity building of national level and district personnel from selected districts in the provision of social welfare services for children.
            2.3  Provision of Social welfare services for children in selected districts.
            2.4  Programmes to combat child labour in 8 municipalities/5 districts and to protect children at risk through family-based interventions in 2 districts.
            2.5  Disaster Risk Reduction and Emergency Preparedness and Response for Child Protection.

implementing_agency: Beautiful Nepal Association, Central Child Welfare Board, Panch Tara Yuva Samrakshyak Manch, Child Welfare Society, Ecology, Agriculture and Rural Development Society, Community Development Programme, Transcultural Psychosocial Organization, Siddhartha Social Development Center, Save the Children, Integrated Community Development Campaign, JSI Research & Training Institute Inc/World Education, Himalayan Human Rights Monitors, Rural Development Center, Rural Community Development Service Council, Diyalo Pariwar, Society of Local Volunteers Effort, Advocary Forum, Human Rights Network and Peace Action Group, Forum for Women, Law & Development, Informal Sector Service Centre, Indreni Rural Development Centre, Centre for Victims of Torture Nepal, Children Women in Social Service and Human Rights, Central Child Welfare Committee

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
